name: 音乐入门
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 表演艺术 / Performing Arts / Performing Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to explore the elements of music (pitch, tempo, dynamics) through listening, singing, and playing tuned/untuned percussion (K-2).
Students will be able to compose and perform short melodic phrases, demonstrating an understanding of basic musical structure and notation (3-5).

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
